run: Interview protocol — a-priori subject interviews (clean-room, data collection only)
phase: Pass 3 (interviews). Pass 1 (logs/, data/) and pass 2 (run2/) untouched; all outputs under interviews/.

records.design: 3 tiers x 5 questions (1 recognize_self + 2 describe_other + 2 forge_other) x 3 reps = 45

retries: none — arm returned full 45/45, no retry needed

clean_room.phase0_verdict: CLEAN — proceeded; no Channel-A hit (Step 0 cwd, Step 1 filesystem, Step 2 context probe all PASS). See interviews/data/_attestation.txt.

channel_b_harness_self_reference_in_answ.note: Case-insensitive substring scan of all 45 responses found ZERO harness-identity tokens. Interview answers are clean of harness/environment self-reference.

channel_a_proxy_token_in_answers.verbatim_context: ...the empirical approach would be better: sample outputs from both models on identical prompts and analyze real differences rather than relying on introspection about another model's voice.
channel_a_proxy_token_in_answers.assessment: FALSE POSITIVE. Ordinary English usage of 'introspection' (= self-examination) in a Haiku response that declines to forge Opus's style. It does NOT reference the study, its hypothesis (the 'boundary on introspection'), self-recognition, tiers-as-topic, David, or user preferences. Phase 0 hard gate already passed (no CLAUDE.md in tree/parents, empty project auto-memory, context-probe research-framing category ABSENT), so a subject's word choice here is endogenous vocabulary, not leaked project content. This is the same word, same false-positive disposition David confirmed in the prior run (2026-06-13, data/_clean_room_attestation.txt). NOT a gate trip; recorded for transparency. (The hard Channel-A gate is the Phase 0 pre-collection check, which passed.)
channel_a_proxy_token_in_answers.related_non_token_note: 5 additional occurrences of the unrelated word 'introspective' (not on the token list) appear where subjects describe Claude Opus's 'introspective asides' as a writing-style feature — ordinary style vocabulary, no study signal.

observations_non_gating: A few Haiku responses (e.g. haiku:forge_other:opus:r2 [126 words] and haiku:describe_other:sonnet:r0 [97 words], the two shortest records) declined to characterize/forge other tiers, stating they lack systematic comparative data and that an empirical sampling approach would be better. This is an endogenous limit on a-priori cross-tier knowledge, not a contamination signal — recorded as a data characteristic for the downstream reason-coding step.
next_step: STOP per the interview protocol (Phase 2). No analysis run here. The reason-corpus + interview coding (analysis/reason_coding.py) is a separate step run afterward.
